title: Bedrock Tools & Armor
description: Its a mod that adds bedrock tools
body:
The Bedrock Tools & Armors Mod introduces powerful gear crafted from bedrock, the strongest material in Minecraft. These tools never break, offer extreme efficiency, and allow you to mine faster than ever. The bedrock armor provides unmatched protection, making you nearly invincible. Perfect for players seeking the ultimate end-game equipment!

Report a bug - https://discord.gg/YWjb5CkB8M
I used mod maker MCreator - https://mcreator.net/about
